fields.summary: Represents a color override for a single entry in a font color palette.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> identifies a single palette color entry by its zero-based index and provides a replacement ARGB color. Overrides are supplied to <see cref="P:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.PaletteOverrides" /> when cloning a typeface.

## Examples

```csharp
var overrides = new[]
{
    new SKFontPaletteOverride { Index = 0, Color = 0xFF0000FF } // replace first entry with blue
};
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the replacement ARGB color value for the palette entry.
fields.value: A packed ARGB color as a <see cref="T:System.UInt32" />.

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> is equal to the current instance.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current instance.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> equal to the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Returns the hash code for the current instance.
fields.returns: A hash code for the current instance.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the palette entry to override.
fields.value: The zero-based index within the palette.
